backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the backend, defining data types (AnalysisResult, UserProfile, UserSettings, etc.) and providing shared functions for storing/retrieving analyses, managing user profiles and settings, with role-based access control via AccessControl mixin.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented feature IDs to their titles, affected files, component dependencies, and test IDs, covering multi-timeframe chart upload, sessionStorage persistence, and related UI/processing changes.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line summaries of each frontend source file, describing the purpose and key behaviors of pages, components, hooks, and context files in the React frontend.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens (background, foreground, card, chart colors, sidebar, etc.) used throughout the UI.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Vite/React app, setting the page title to 'Advance Signal Pro' and mounting the React app at the #root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with all application routes (Dashboard, AnalyzeChart, ProcessingScreen, Results, History, Settings) wrapped in a ThemeProvider.
frontend/src/components/CameraCapture.ts: Camera capture component using the useCamera hook, supporting start/stop/capture/retake/switch-camera actions with all UI text in Portuguese and error handling for permission, not-found, and not-supported scenarios.
frontend/src/components/ChartOverlay.tsx: A React canvas component that renders a chart image with optional overlaid support/resistance lines (dashed green/red) and a directional arrow indicating buy or sell signals.
frontend/src/components/FileUpload.tsx: A file upload drop zone component supporting drag-and-drop, click-to-browse, and clipboard paste for images up to 10MB, with a preview of the selected file.
A list item component for displaying a past analysis entry, showing the signal direction, confidence percentage, timestamp, and a WIN/LOSS badge based on whether the operation was followed.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: The root layout component that wraps all pages with a full-screen container, renders child routes via Outlet, a toast notifier, and a footer with branding.
A UI component representing a single processing step with an animated progress bar, spinner, and completion checkmark, driven by isActive and isComplete props.
frontend/src/components/SettingRow.tsx: A simple layout component that renders a labeled settings row with a description on the left and an arbitrary control element on the right.
frontend/src/components/SignalCard.tsx: A card component that displays the primary trading signal (COMPRA, VENDA, NEUTRO, SEM ENTRADA) with confidence percentage, trend direction badge, and optional strength indicator.
frontend/src/components/TimeframeSummary: A compact card component showing a single timeframe's (M1/M3/M5) signal, trend direction, and confidence percentage, with color-coded styling and an optional highlighted state.
frontend/src/components/TimeframeUploadS: A React component that renders an upload slot for a single trading timeframe (M1, M3, M5), supporting file input, drag-and-drop, clipboard paste, and camera capture with preview and removal functionality.
frontend/src/config/apiConfig.ts: Empty configuration file, likely intended to hold API configuration constants or settings.
frontend/src/context/ThemeContext.tsx: Provides a React context for light/dark theme management, persisting the selected theme to localStorage and applying it as a CSS class on the document root.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using TanStack Query, initializing it with the current Internet Identity and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useClipboard.ts: A React hook that listens for paste events and extracts image files from the clipboard, exposing the captured image and any permission errors.
frontend/src/hooks/useCountdownTimer.ts: A React hook that implements a countdown timer, decrementing seconds each interval and exposing formatted time remaining, a finished flag, and raw seconds left.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status.
frontend/src/hooks/useMultiTimeframeUplo: A React hook managing file upload state for three trading timeframes (M1, M3, M5), providing setters, clear functions, and a list of filled slots.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines TanStack Query hooks for fetching and mutating backend data including analyses, user settings, and daily operation progress via the ICP actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useSettings.ts: A thin wrapper hook around useGetSettings and useUpdateSettings that exposes user settings state and an async update function.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining Tailwind base/component/utility layers, CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, processing bar animations, custom range input styles, and touch-friendly utilities.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with TanStack QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AnalyzeChart.tsx: Page for uploading up to 3 multi-timeframe chart images (M1, M3, M5), converting them to data URLs, storing them in sessionStorage, and navigating to the processing screen.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Main dashboard page displaying the app logo, AI status badge, and navigation buttons to Analyze, History, and Settings pages.
frontend/src/pages/History.tsx: Page that fetches and lists past chart analyses using a query hook, showing a loading spinner or empty state with a prompt to analyze a chart.
frontend/src/pages/ProcessingScreen.tsx: Animated multi-stage processing screen that reads chart images from sessionStorage, runs local candle analysis per timeframe, merges results, and navigates to the Results page.
frontend/src/pages/Results.tsx: Results page that reads the latest analysis from sessionStorage and displays the trading signal, confidence, patterns, countdown timer, multi-timeframe summary, and win/loss feedback buttons.
frontend/src/pages/Settings.tsx: Settings page allowing users to configure default timeframe, AI sensitivity, daily operation limit, and notifications, persisting values to both localStorage and the backend canister.
frontend/src/services/analysisApi.ts: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/services/localCandleAnalysi: Client-side candlestick chart analysis engine that processes chart images via pixel scanning to detect trends, support/resistance levels, candlestick patterns, and generate trading signals without any external API calls.
frontend/src/types/analysisTypes.ts: TypeScript interfaces defining the shape of local analysis results, including fields for trend, signal, confidence, patterns, probabilities, support/resistance levels, and optional multi-timeframe breakdowns.
frontend/src/types/apiTypes.ts: TypeScript interfaces for external API analysis responses, documenting the expected 6-step rule-based technical analysis process and the response shape including signal, trend, confidence, patterns, and error fields.
frontend/src/utils/dataUrlToFile.ts: Utility function that safely converts a base64 data URL string into a File object, returning null for any invalid, malformed, or unsupported input without throwing.
frontend/src/utils/formatTimestamp.ts: Converts a nanosecond bigint timestamp to a human-readable Portuguese date/time string (e.g., '5 de Jan de 2024 às 14:30').
frontend/src/utils/mapApiResponse.ts: Defines the serializable AnalysisResult interface used by the Results page and provides a mapping function to convert a LocalAnalysisResult into that shape.
frontend/src/utils/mergeMultiTimeframeRe: Merges multiple per-timeframe LocalAnalysisResult objects into a single AnalysisResult, using the highest-confidence result as the primary signal and attaching all results in a multiTimeframe array.
frontend/src/utils/shareAnalysis.ts: Shares a formatted Portuguese analysis summary using the Web Share API, falling back to clipboard copy for unsupported browsers.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens, extended spacing/shadow/radius values, accordion animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Tracks the current state of the Advance Signal Pro mobile app project (version 63), including architectural notes, known issues (analysis errors, timeframe bugs, settings persistence), and a list of existing implemented features.
